p1.title: Clean Sedan still needs repair
p1.body: This car cannot take jobs until you repair it.

p1.title: Clean Sedan seller replied
p1.body: I can do it, but this is not a five-minute handoff. It will take about 6h.

p1.body: Not trying to be annoying, but I got more interest than expected. New number is $2754.

p1.title: Cat Carrier Errand
p1.body: This is short notice, but the payout is decent. Short run. The client says the cat is chill, which feels optimistic.
p1.result: Imani's Cat Carrier Errand paid $423. A customer sent a thank-you message with way too many exclamation points.

p1.title: Soup Transport
p1.body: This is short notice, but the payout is decent. High-stakes soup. Do not corner like a movie villain.
p1.result: Imani's Soup Transport paid $429. A passenger said, 'Nice car,' and meant it.

p1.title: Dry Cleaning Drama
p1.body: This should be simple, which is exactly what people say before it is not. Client needs one outfit delivered like it is evidence.
p1.result: Jules's Dry Cleaning Drama paid $525. The job was boring in the profitable way.

p2.title: Questionable Duplex still needs repair
p2.body: Rent is reduced until you repair the damaged unit.

p2.title: Neighborhood Loop
p2.body: You were recommended. Please do not make me regret that. Three quick stops around town. Easy miles if traffic behaves.
p2.receivedBecause: Your driver rep is getting better clients.
